input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. Also attached is an image showing six CAD views of our vehicle design. What is the name of the component(s) highlighted in pink? Answer just with the name of the highlighted component(s) and nothing else.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.15
            TITLE: component envelope

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.15: Component Envelope
F.1.15 Component Envelope 
The area that is inside a plane from the top of the Main Hoop to the top of the Front 
Bulkhead, plus a plane from the top of the Main Hoop to the rearmost Triangulated structural 
tube, or monocoque equivalent.      * see note in step F.1.13 above

RULE: t.7.2.2
            TITLE: bodywork, a nose cone, or another component mounted to the vehicle is an aerodynamic

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.2.2: Bodywork, a nose cone, or another component mounted to the vehicle is an Aerodynamic
T.7.2.2 Bodywork, a nose cone, or another component mounted to the vehicle is an Aerodynamic 
Device if is designed to, or may possibly, produce force due to aerodynamic effects

RULE: ic.3.3.3
            TITLE: failure of any component of the throttle system must not prevent the throttle returning to

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.3.3.3: Failure of any component of the throttle system must not prevent the throttle returning to
IC.3.3.3 Failure of any component of the throttle system must not prevent the throttle returning to 
the closed position.

RULE: ve.1.2
            TITLE: school name

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.1.2: School Name
VE.1.2 School Name 
Each vehicle must clearly display the school name.   
a. Abbreviations are allowed if unique and generally recognized 
b. The name must be in Roman characters minimum 50 mm high on both sides of the 
vehicle.  
c. The characters must be placed on a high contrast background in an easily visible location.  
d. The school name may also appear in non Roman characters, but the Roman character 
version must be uppermost on the sides.

RULE: ev.6.7.1
            TITLE: grounding is required for:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.7.1: Grounding is required for:
EV.6.7.1 Grounding is required for: 
a. Parts of the vehicle which are 100 mm or less from any Tractive System component 
b. The Tractive System Firewall T.1.9
